searchPage.catalogHint: Listings match your dates and minimum guest count in this destination. Per-room capacity is on each property detail page.
searchPage.emptyCatalog: No properties found for the selected destination and dates.
searchPage.emptyFeatured: No featured stays available right now.
searchPage.emptyFilters: No properties match the selected filters.

roomCard.heldAlert: This room is on hold by another guest. Please check back in a few minutes or choose a different room.
roomCard.ownHoldText: You have an active hold on this room.
roomCard.selectDatesTooltip: Select check-in and check-out dates first

payment.expiredBody: Your 15-minute hold has ended. Rooms are subject to availability — please start a new search.
payment.countdownBannerAfter: — complete payment before the hold expires.
payment.resumeBanner: We found your previous booking hold — resuming where you left off.
payment.emailHelper: Confirmation email will be sent to this address.
payment.paypalRedirect: You will be redirected to PayPal to complete your payment.
payment.cancellationPolicyText: Free cancellation until 48 hours before check-in. Non-refundable after that period.
payment.securityBadge: Your payment is protected by TravelHub Secure. We use 256-bit encryption.
payment.terms: By clicking Pay, you agree to TravelHub's Terms & Conditions.
